channel.title: Nightbox LLC
channel.description: Computational biology and gene therapy. NKG2D-LIF6 chimeric receptor-effector AAV9 platform for solid tumor oncology. Open in silico methodology under CC BY 4.0.

item.title: Nightbox LLC publishes complete open in silico design package for NKG2D-LIF6 chimera gene therapy
item.dc:creator: Artem Shakin
item.description: Wyoming biotech publishes complete computational design package, methods, and source repo for an elephant-LIF6 + NKG2D chimeric receptor-effector AAV9 gene therapy under CC BY 4.0. WebXR molecular viewer included.

item.title: NKG2D-LIF6: a single-construct chimeric receptor-effector AAV9 gene therapy — in silico characterization preprint v1
item.dc:creator: Artem Shakin
item.description: 2,123 bp NKG2D-LIF6 chimera fusing the human NKG2D extracellular domain with the elephant LIF6 mitochondrial pro-apoptotic effector. Predicted ~99% TGI ceiling on CRC syngeneic models (in silico). Wet-lab validation Q3-Q4 2026.

item.title: NKG2D-LIF6 chimera in silico design notes — open repository released
item.dc:creator: Artem Shakin
item.description: Public source repository covering construct architecture, named computational tools (AlphaFold3, RoseTTAFold, PyMOL, Rosetta), and primary literature references. CC BY 4.0.

item.title: Federal capability statement and SBIR roadmap published
item.dc:creator: Artem Shakin
item.description: One-page printable federal capability statement for SBIR/STTR/ARPA-H/BARDA contracting officers, with named PA/RFA solicitation roadmap.
